content.title: AI is so big, it’s now impossible for investors to avoid
content.summary: Exposure to the artificial-intelligence boom has become virtually impossible for investors to avoid. The theme hasn’t just cornered the stock market. It has systematically swallowed up corporate credit and venture capital, too.

content.title: CoreWeave’s stock suffers another long losing streak. Here’s what’s driving the selling.
content.summary: Higher interest rates may be a problem for the AI-native cloud provider given its “unusually high exposure to debt financing,” one analyst says.

content.title: The U.S. oil reserve is at a 40-year low — but the government says there’s still plenty of breathing room
content.summary: Energy Department says operational minimum for the storage caverns is about 70 million barrels, a level far lower than oil industry estimates

content.title: Food banks, affordable-housing providers scramble as inflation hammers low-income Americans
